content_body: This was our second stay at Sanctuary, and it was a great way to spend a long Valentine’s Day weekend! We kept the fireplace busy and though the air was cold, the sun was warm. We enjoyed gazing out at the surrounding mountains and pastures from the porch. We also enjoyed massages at Serenity in the Mountains and dinner at Harvest on Main. A wonderful, relaxing weekend at our favorite cabin!
title: Wonderful, Relaxing Valentine's Day Weekend
